subcodes.first_line: O Zahra! The Sun of loving-kindness hath risen, the rain of mercy hath descended, and the tongue of the All-Merciful doth in all times address His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زهرا آفتاب عنایت مشرق و امطار رحمت نازل و لسان رحمن در کل احیان عباد و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
